title: Fun Time Farm Train Set with Play Animals, Push-Along Toy, 6 Farm Animal Figures, Ages 12+ Months
features: COMPLETE SET: Colourful train set includes locomotive, three carriages, and 6 adorable farm animal figures for imaginative play
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and early recognition of farm animals and colours
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for little ones aged 12 months and above with chunky, easy-to-grasp pieces
PUSH-ALONG DESIGN: Smooth-rolling wheels allow toddlers to easily push and play with the train on any flat surface
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from sturdy materials with connecting carriages that stay together during playtime
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to the delightful world of farm animals with this charming Fun Time Farm Train Set. This colourful push-along toy features a vibrant locomotive with three connecting carriages in red, blue, and yellow, perfect for small hands to grasp and explore. The set includes six adorable farm animal figures that can be arranged on the train cars, helping develop fine motor skills and imaginative play. Each animal figure is designed with child-friendly rounded edges and bright colours that capture young minds. Suitable for children aged 12 months and above, this train set encourages creative storytelling while teaching animal recognition. The smooth-rolling wheels ensure easy movement across flat surfaces, making playtime both engaging and entertaining. Watch as your child creates their own farming adventures, loading and unloading the animal passengers while developing hand-eye coordination and spatial awareness. Safety Warning No applicable warnings Box Contains 1 x Push Along Farm Animals Train See more
